rationale.fidelity: Preserves the platform-first sequence, binary disclosure rule, latent seller quality, strategic seller participation, buyer belief updating, and transaction-revenue objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the governance choice, strategic mechanism, stakes, and disclosure-versus-nondisclosure counterfactual, though implementation detail is brief.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: The response makes no novelty or literature claim, so the conditional scholarly-positioning criterion is not implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Equilibrium play and parameter validity are expressly treated as assumptions, and the unavailable seller quality is correctly bounded.
rationale.overall: The response faithfully frames the sequential platform-governance problem without hidden information or model changes; all minima and the passing score are met.
